usage: addTieHiLo [-help] [-cell <tieCell-list>] [-createHierPort {true|false}] [-keepExisting {true|false}] [-matchingPDs {true|false}] [-postMask {true|false}] [-powerDomain <powerDomain name>] [-prefix <tie-prefix>] [-reportHierPort {true|false}] [-cellPin value | -instancePin file name | -excludePin file name]

options.name: -cell
options.description: list of maximum 2 tie-cells to be used by addTieHiLo command

options.name: -cellPin
options.description: cell pins that to be tied

options.name: -createHierPort
options.description: Add tie-cells in different hierarchy than tie-off pins when possible

options.name: -matchingPDs
options.description: insert tie-cells in all power domains

options.name: -postMask
options.description: insert tie cells in post mask flow

options.name: -reportHierPort
options.description: Report created ports when createHierPort is set
